# Ken Imoto

> AI Systems Engineer building AI-native organizations powered by LLMs, automation, and distributed agents.

## About

Ken Imoto is an AI Systems Engineer and the Founder & CEO of Propel-Lab (https://propel-lab.co.jp), a company focused on Android and web application development with AI integration.

## Expertise

- LLMO (Large Language Model Optimization)
- AI Agent Design
- Context Engineering
- LLM-powered automation
- Distributed AI agent systems

## Publications

- Practical Claude Code (Kindle/Zenn)
- LLMO (Kindle/Zenn)
